justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences, including flexible requests and specific times on different days.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered the closest available slots and intelligently expanded its search based on user feedback, eventually finding a perfect match.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all user requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear apologies for unavailability and successfully booking the desired slot.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context throughout the conversation, intelligently expanding its search parameters when initial requests were unavailable and never re-asking for previously provided information.
